description:
The image captures a tranquil night scene in a room bathed in soft, dim lighting. Dominating the left side of the frame are two windows adorned with white curtains, allowing a gentle glow to seep into the room. The right side of the image is occupied by a black table draped with a white cloth, adding a touch of elegance to the setting.

The background features a wall painted in a soothing light blue color, which complements the overall ambiance of the room. Adding to the charm of the scene is a dark red door located on the left side of the frame. The entire image exudes a sense of calm and serenity, as if inviting the viewer to step into this peaceful sanctuary.
